arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: Napoli 'drop major Alejandro Garnacho hint' as 'contact is made' over deal for 23-year-old
arts.sum: Napoli, who continue to be linked with Manchester United's Alejandro Garnacho, allegedly make contact with Borussia Dortmund to discuss a deal for Karim Adeyemi.

arts.ttl: Ole Gunnar Solskjaer starts life after Man Utd with flying Besiktas triumph thanks to two Premier League flops
arts.sum: Milot Rashica and Joao Mario did the job for the Norwegian

arts.ttl: Clement urges Rangers to 'write history' at Old Trafford
arts.sum: Manager Philippe Clement will not "park the bus" at Old Trafford as he urges Rangers to "write history" with a first win against Manchester United.

arts.ttl: Fabrizio Romano: Man Utd Working on Second Signing Alongside Dorgu
arts.sum: A new attacking signing is on Manchester United's agenda alongside their pursuit of Patrick Dorgu.

arts.ttl: Ole Gunnar Solskjaer starts life after Man Utd with flying Besiktas triumph thanks to two Premier League flops
arts.sum: Milot Rashica and Joao Mario did the job for the Norwegian

arts.ttl: 'He will be devastated' – Sir Jim Ratcliffe told impact of Ruben Amorim's brutal comment
arts.sum: Gary Neville was left stunned by Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim's comments after the defeat by Brighton and says they will not have gone down well with Sir Jim Ratcliffe

arts.ttl: James Tavernier names key Rangers lessons learned by Amad Diallo that helped catapult him to Man Utd stardom
arts.sum: The two former Ibrox team-mates are set to clash at Old Trafford

arts.ttl: Bigger mess than Man Utd: Ten Hag is RIGHT to snub Dortmund
arts.sum: Bigger mess than Man Utd: Ten Hag is RIGHT to snub Dortmund When he took the Man Utd job, the club was struggling and crying out for a 'disciplinarian.' The same is the case for Dortmund, who have several players on massive wages and who are unwilling to pull their weight.

arts.ttl: Man United 'fail with last-minute hijack attempt' as South American 'snubs Old Trafford move'
arts.sum: Manchester United reportedly fail with a last-ditch attempt to sign Julio Enciso on loan from Brighton & Hove Albion, with the attacker heading for Ipswich Town.

arts.ttl: Manchester United told how to complete transfer for player who nearly shocked Old Trafford
arts.sum: Tyler Dibling has enjoyed a fine breakthrough campaign at Southampton - prompting heavy-handed speculation around his future.
